rag_rules: Place component type assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes, not implementation scopes
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if-then-else for branching logic
generic_rules: Write guarantees that relate visible outputs to visible inputs in component type contracts
Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) for contract expressions
Declare constants and equations with valid AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool)
Align helper declaration types with expression types to avoid type mismatch errors
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Component type contracts should not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths
anti_patterns: Do not use Boolean data port values in numeric range comparisons unless the port is explicitly AGREE bool
Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type annexes
